examples: A couple of inches of dry, powdery snow had fallen.
The leaves have yellow areas on the top and underneath are powdery orange spots.
Its surface was powdery and sprinkled with grains of black dust.
To make up for the nearly unbearable smell, the fibrous, powdery tanfruit has an addicting sweet taste inside.
The area does not have typical skiing facilities, so the backcountry runs tend to stay unpacked and powdery.
